# pheno-tracing

## Purpose
Canonical observability substrate for the Phenotype fleet. Wraps `tracing` + OpenTelemetry OTLP export. Provides fleet-wide span correlation and resource attributes.

## When to use
- Adding structured logging to any Rust service
- Emitting OTel traces to pheno-observability
- Need fleet-wide trace_id propagation

## When NOT to use
- Metrics-only emission (use pheno-metrics directly)
- Log-only output (use `env_logger`)

## Quickstart
```rust
use pheno_tracing::prelude::*;
init_tracing("my-service")?;
let _span = info_span!("operation", trace_id = %trace_id());
```

## Env vars
- `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` — OTLP collector URL (default http://localhost:4317)
- `RUST_LOG` — log filter (default info,pheno=debug)
- `PHENO_TRACING_SAMPLE_RATE` — 0.0-1.0 (default 1.0)

## Key types
- `init_tracing(name: &str) -> Result<(), Error>`
- `trace_id() -> TraceId` — current span's trace ID
- `span!` macro — augmented with `device` field

## Example
See `pheno-tracing/examples/otlp_export.rs`.
